creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
Hello,

in case of general building, can you update your portstree and try again? (There have been some updates and it builds at least on the cluster fine)

I think an extra rebuild of chromium is not needed for widevine support.

The option only adds foreign-cdm as run-depend so you should only need to build foreign-cdm and linux-widevine-cdm.
